request_payload.exposure_text: Our allies are taking advantage of us. While we're over here paying our fair share, countries like Germany are cutting defense spending and expecting us to pick up the slack. This isn't just about money—it's about trust. If they won't stand with us when it counts, why should we keep supporting them? #NationalSecurity #AllianceCommitment
